title: La insaciable
writer: Manuel R. Ojeda, Juan José Ortega, Ramón Pérez Peláez
actors: María Antonieta Pons, Rafael Baledón, Carmen Hermosillo
plot: A former cabaret singer is rejected by her loving husband when he finds out that she keeps in touch with someone from her previous life. The hearth broken husband is a famous cardiologist and leaves for Paris.
